name: LoomCompare
description: Content-level diff between two stages of a CSA Loom deployment pipeline. Use as a pre-deploy gate. Talks only to your own Loom Console.
helpMarkDown: Requires `loomPipelineCiEnabled=true` + a CI Bearer token. See tools/ado-loom-task/README.md.
author: CSA Loom

inputs.name: loomBaseUrl
inputs.label: Loom Console base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Your Loom Console origin, e.g. https://loom.contoso.com.

inputs.name: failOnDifferences
inputs.label: Fail when the stages differ
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the task when any item differs / is missing between source and target.

outputVariables.name: different
outputVariables.description: Items present in both but with differing definitions.

outputVariables.name: onlyInSource
outputVariables.description: Items present only in the source stage.

outputVariables.name: notInSource
outputVariables.description: Items present only in the target stage.
